Video.summary: In this charity showdown, Pro pickleball players and celebs will represent their alma maters and battle it out for the Picklebowl 2023 trophy. Hosted by Heisman Trophy winner and former NFL player turned pickleball enthusiast, Danny Wuerffel.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament
Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament
Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament

Video.summary: Tune in for a high-energy match between the Gilbert Gladiators and the Tempe Tornadoes at The Orchard in Scottsdale, Arizona. This April 25, 2023 episode of Tuesday Night Pickleball features fast-paced action and strategic plays as both teams battle it out in a pivotal match. With sharp shots, effective communication, and critical moments, the Gladiators and Tornadoes go head-to-head for a thrilling finish. Watch as the teams showcase their pickleball prowess in one of the most exciting events of the AZ PBL season.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes
Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes
Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes

Video.summary: Marcello Jardim and Marco Osorio go head-to-head in the Gold Medal Match of the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships. With power, precision, and nonstop intensity, this Men’s Pro Singles final showcases top-tier talent and a dramatic battle for the championship title.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: In this alternate cut of the Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal at the 2024 US Open, Suzanne Leblang & Milan Rane face off against Martina Frantova & Christine Karges in a battle of shot placement, net pressure, and quick resets. Filmed in Naples, Florida, this matchup delivers a new perspective on one of the tournament’s most tactical and fast-paced doubles clashes.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg
US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg
US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg

Image.alt: S01E06 - The Championship
S01E06 - The Championship
S01E06 - The Championship

Video.summary: It's a high-stakes "Wednesday evening pickleball party" on Day 6 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as Pune United takes on the Chennai Super Champs at the CCI Brabourne Stadium. With both teams currently sitting low on the points table (fifth and sixth), this game is a crucial must-win for both, offering a chance for one team to gain much-needed inspiration and move up the standings.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

Video.summary: It's Super Sunday on Day 3 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Game Number Five pits the Chennai Super Champs against the Delhi team (Dilwale) at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The stakes are incredibly high as teams battle for the final semi-final spots.The action starts with the First Mixed Doubles match, featuring Chennai's coach, the legendary pro Joey Farias, teaming up with Anna Clarice. They face the formidable duo of Delhi's Willie Chung and Lauren Mercado. The match is a tactical masterclass, with Willie Chung noted for his consistent, pro-level reset game and Farias praised for his on-court intelligence.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: The high-stakes action continues on Day 9 with the Second Semi-Final of the World Pickleball League (WPBL), featuring Pune United against Mumbai Pickle Power. The air is thick with anticipation, especially with the major news that Mumbai's star player, Brandon Lane, may not be available for the matchup.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2

Video.summary: It's the "Southern Derby" in the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Bengaluru takes on Chennai in the second tie of the day, live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The match features 48 players from six teams and 14 countries, with commentators detailing every crucial point.The tie begins with a thrilling Men's Singles match: Bengaluru's Blaskowitz (a Croatian talent) faces Chennai's Sobek (the Polish national champion). The commentators highlight the extreme patience and dinking skills demonstrated by both players, with Sobek's ability to keep the ball low being a key factor.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the final showdown of the league stages as Delhi Dilwale and the Rajasthan Titans clash in a high-stakes battle for pride and final positioning. The atmosphere is electric as Rajasthan’s Lorena Dupnik delivers a "professional performance" in a come-from-behind singles victory against Delhi’s Mehek Kuan, setting a fierce tone for the tie. Witness a tactical masterclass in mixed doubles featuring the relentless power of Max Mantor and the "next level" skills of Trang Huynh as they attempt to dismantle the Titans’ defensive wall. With veteran Rob Cassidy making his highly anticipated men's doubles debut, every rally becomes a desperate fight for dominance in the season's final league encounter.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Rajasthan - Day 11 Tie 2

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 returns to the Jio World Garden in Mumbai for an electrifying Tie 8 showdown. The defending champions, Bengaluru Jawans—led by coach Oliver Strecker and backed by owners Atlee and Priya—return to the court for the first time since their dominant opening night performance. They face a determined Delhi Dilwale squad, coached by Wesley Gabrielsson, who are looking to climb the standings after a hard-fought tie-break victory in their previous outing.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2

Video.summary: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Seattle United in a men's match.
Video.title: NPL - Stingers vs United (Mens)

Image.alt: NPL - Stingers vs United (Mens)
NPL - Stingers vs United (Mens)
NPL - Stingers vs United (Mens)

Video.summary: Catch the collegiate pickleball excitement from Week 2, Day 2 of the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This intense team match features Utah Tech taking on Utah State as they compete for a national bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri.The episode features commentary on the exploding growth of college pickleball with college legend and Yola's College Relationship Manager, Timber Tucker. Watch key matchups in men's doubles, women's singles, and the deciding mixed doubles games. Key players include Gavin Fowler (singles 5.2 rating) , Brinley Horton , and Bo Cavell from Utah Tech, as well as standout players Olivia and Brady.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.summary: Pros vs College Allstars at the 2025 NCPA Championships from Las Vegas.
Video.title: NCPA: Pros vs. College Allstars

Image.alt: NCPA: Pros vs. College Allstars
NCPA: Pros vs. College Allstars
NCPA: Pros vs. College Allstars

Video.summary: In this action-packed Men’s Doubles match from Picklebowl 2023, Riley Newman and Josh Gartman face off against CJ Clinger and Tim Parks. These top pickleball players go head-to-head in a fast-paced, competitive match that features strategic plays, intense rallies, and plenty of drama. As the players represent their alma maters, the stakes are high as they battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Drew Fieldhouse and Dave Fleming highlights the strategic nuances of the game while adding expert insights into each player’s performance. Watch these elite athletes showcase their skills in this thrilling charity event for the Wuerffel Foundation.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3

Video.summary: Experience the exciting Women's Doubles Open 4.5+ Final from the 2023 English Open held at Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. This match features dynamic teams: Megan Fudge and Susannah Barr face off against Lee Whitwell and Riley Bohnert in a highly competitive final. Follow expert commentary highlighting key plays including Susannah Barr’s precise lobs, Megan Fudge’s powerful forehand, and strategic teamwork. See how the match unfolds in a best-of-three games format with a hard stop on time. This showcase of top-level English pickleball captures the skill, tactics, and intensity of the sport. Stay tuned for post-match insights and upcoming mixed doubles action.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert

Video.summary: Welcome back to the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships for the Men's Pro Doubles semifinal match. This is a great representation of the sport's global growth, with the top-ranked player from India competing. The match features teams Munro and Yang against Bhatia and Mehta. The match is tightly contested, with the level of play stepping up as they enter the semi-finals. The caption file also notes that Bhatia's grandfather was a world-renowned cricketer in India with the nickname "the Sultan of Swing," which is comparable to an NFL star like Tom Brady.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Video.summary: Witness an unexpected and electrifying Mixed Pro Doubles showdown from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida! Originally scheduled for a back court, this highly anticipated match featuring Andre Agassi and Anna Leigh Waters was moved to Championship Court due to overwhelming crowd demand, creating an unforgettable atmosphere. Relive every moment as these top players battle it out in a thrilling display of professional pickleball. Don't miss the action from East Naples Community Park – the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
